name: Playlist Curator
author: Lumae
description: Includes Smart Search and Playlist Expander for discovering, extending, previewing, deduplicating, and saving playlists.

versions.changelog: Add a Feedback & issues footer link to the GitHub repository on both plugin pages.
Save new playlists with exactly the entered name instead of appending the AudioMuse _instant suffix.
Keep long track titles and artist names inside their table column so they no longer overlap album information.
Add visible Clear Workbench actions, apply Lumae branding and authorship, and clarify Smart Search and Playlist Expander in catalog metadata.
Correct the minimum AudioMuse version after verifying compatibility with 2.6.0 and 2.6.1; runtime behavior is unchanged.
Initial plugin release of Smart Search, Playlist Extender, weighted influence, duplicate review, audio preview, and media-server playlist saving.
